overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a moonlit rural farmstead and continuing down a dirt trail through open countryside. The scene features a wooden barn, a horse, and transitions from a farm area to a natural trail environment under a bright full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmstead with wooden barn and horse

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the wooden barn and passing by a horse tied near the entrance

notable_agents.action: horse standing tethered near the barn, grazing on grass

entered.detail: large wooden barn with illuminated interior light and double doors
old-fashioned wooden wagon with canvas cover parked on the grass
tall oak trees surrounding the farmstead clearing

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a moonlit farmstead toward a wooden barn with an interior light glowing. A horse stands tethered near the barn entrance while a covered wagon sits parked to the left. The scene is quiet and empty, with oak trees surrounding the clearing under a bright full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside dirt trail through grassy fields

events.description: leaves the farmstead area and enters the open countryside trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dirt path away from the farmstead into the open countryside

entered.detail: large boulder sitting beside the dirt trail
mountain range visible on the horizon under the moonlight

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down a winding dirt trail through open grassland, leaving the farmstead behind. The path is lined with oak trees and large rocks, with distant mountains visible on the horizon. The bright moon illuminates the empty countryside as the character progresses steadily forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet, moonlit farmstead into the expansive openness of the rural countryside. It begins with the character walking toward a wooden barn where an interior light glows, passing a tethered horse and a parked covered wagon under the canopy of surrounding oak trees. As the character moves past the farm buildings, the scene shifts toward a winding dirt trail that leads away from the clearing. The environment then opens into vast grasslands lined with large rocks and oak trees, while the bright full moon illuminates the path forward. Finally, the camera tracks the steady progression through the empty landscape, revealing distant mountains silhouetted against the night horizon.
